flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Western Texas College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Texas College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Texas College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Western Texas College rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 (51.7% → 74.2%).
